trajectory.description: Observation: Baseline achieved 0.6525 balanced_accuracy after 5 epochs (~146s). Few-shot accuracy is only 0.4048, which is the main bottleneck. Training loss is near 0 but val_acc is 0.63, showing overfitting. Analysis: The model is overfitting to the balanced sampler. Key improvements needed: 1) Train longer (50+ epochs), 2) Use stronger augmentation (RandAugment/AutoAugment), 3) Use label smoothing, 4) Consider logit adjustment for long-tail, 5) Use mixup/cutmix. Each epoch takes ~29s, so 50 epochs = ~24min. Decision: Train for 50 epochs with improved settings - add RandAugment, label smoothing, logit adjustment loss, and mixup. This should significantly improve few-shot accuracy.
